title: Earnings Preview: TLRY to Report Financial Results Pre-market on April 01
text: Tilray Brands is scheduled to report financial results pre-market on April 1. The earnings report will provide insight into the company's Q3 fiscal 2026 performance across cannabis, beverages, and distribution segments. Key metrics to watch include cannabis revenue growth, international expansion progress, gross margin trends, and adjusted EBITDA performance. Management guidance for fiscal 2026 and forward outlook will be important indicators of the company's growth trajectory.
